calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-14-2017 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-03-2017 Continued To Jun-14-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gary Alabaster for Stanley Yee (Petitioner).

Mr. Alabaster stated that the only asset of the Estate is a promissory note that was secured by a deed of trust, that they needed authority to execute subordination of the documents, that he does not know if his Client wants to continue probate and that he is waiting for his Client to decide. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to June 14, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If Counsel does not address the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes, the petition will go off calendar.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
